_note: Demo tooling layer — ONE real MCP server: Datadog (official, OAuth over HTTP, no committed secret). GitLab and AWS are deliberately NOT MCP servers: their CLIs (glab, aws) already cover the ground and will be wrapped as skills later (see docs/how-it-works.md §5). The Datadog endpoint is org/site-specific — set DATADOG_MCP_URL from `/ddsetup` or your Datadog site's docs (GovCloud unsupported). With it unset the server shows in /mcp as declared-but-unconnected. Recommended alternative to this manual block: install Datadog's own plugin via `/plugin install datadog@claude-plugins-official` then `/ddsetup`, which auto-fills the endpoint and runs the OAuth flow.
